The changes have been made successfully with no linter errors. Here's a summary of what was updated:

**Both `SpeechToTextEvaluation.tsx` and `TextToSpeechEvaluation.tsx`:**

1. Expanded the `LanguageOption` type to include all 11 languages:
   - english, hindi, kannada, bengali, malayalam, marathi, odia, punjabi, tamil, telugu, gujarati

2. Updated the `languageDisplayName` mapping with proper display names (e.g., "Bengali", "Malayalam", etc.)

3. Added all 11 language options to the dropdown select element

The existing provider filtering logic will automatically filter providers based on the selected language. For example:
- If you select **Bengali**, only providers that support Bengali (like Cartesia, Deepgram, ElevenLabs, Google, Sarvam, Smallest for STT) will appear
- If you select **Odia**, only providers like Google, ElevenLabs, Sarvam (for STT) will appear since they support Odia

The filtering uses the `supportedLanguages` arrays defined in `providers.ts` to determine which providers support each language.

                  "content": "    - Green checkmark when &#96;success === true&#96; (completed successfully)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 216,
                  "content": "    - Red X when &#96;success === false&#96; (failed)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 217,
                  "content": "  - **Right panel**: Selected provider's overall metrics + results table (ground truth vs predictions)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 218,
                  "content": "  - First provider is selected by default"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 219,
                  "content": "  - Clicking a provider shows its details on the right"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 220,
                  "content": "- **Provider error messages** (red ❌ with message): Only displayed when evaluation status is &#96;done&#96;, not during &#96;in_progress&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 221,
                  "content": "- **Metrics**: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge (Pass/Fail), TTFB, Processing Time",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 222,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 223,
                  "content": "### 4. Text-to-Speech Evaluation (&#96;/tts&#96;)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 224,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 225,
                  "content": "**Page Structure:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 226,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 227,
                  "content": "- &#96;/tts&#96; - List page showing all TTS evaluation jobs"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 228,
                  "content": "- &#96;/tts/new&#96; - Create a new TTS evaluation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 229,
                  "content": "- &#96;/tts/[uuid]&#96; - View evaluation details and results"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 230,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 231,
                  "content": "**List Page (&#96;/tts&#96;):**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 232,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 233,
                  "content": "- **View all TTS evaluations** in a sortable table (sorted by created date)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 234,
                  "content": "- **Columns**: Providers (as pills), Language, Status, Samples count, Created At"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 235,
                  "content": "- **Click to view details** - opens the evaluation detail page"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 236,
                  "content": "- **\"New TTS Evaluation\" button** - navigates to the create page"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 237,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 238,
                  "content": "**Create Page (&#96;/tts/new&#96;):**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 239,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 240,
                  "content": "- **Add text samples** to convert to speech (manual input OR CSV upload, max 20 rows)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 241,
                  "content": "- **CSV upload option**: Upload a CSV file with a &#96;text&#96; column to bulk import samples",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 242,
                  "content": "- **Download sample CSV**: Button to download a template CSV with correct format",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 243,
                  "content": "- **Select language** (English, Hindi, or Kannada) - provider list filters based on language support"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 244,
                  "content": "- **Select providers to compare**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 245,
                  "content": "- **Run evaluation** - creates evaluation and redirects to detail page"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 246,
                  "content": "- **Row limit**: Maximum 20 rows per evaluation. Shows toast error with \"Contact Us\" link if exceeded"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 247,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 248,
                  "content": "**Detail Page (&#96;/tts/[uuid]&#96;):**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 249,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 250,
                  "content": "- **Polls for results** while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 251,
                  "content": "- **Default tab behavior**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 252,
                  "content": "  - When evaluation is already complete on page load: defaults to \"Leaderboard\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 253,
                  "content": "  - When evaluation is in progress: defaults to \"Outputs\" to show results as they arrive"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 254,
                  "content": "  - Automatically switches to \"Leaderboard\" when evaluation completes during polling"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 255,
                  "content": "- **Intermediate results**: Shows Outputs and About tabs during &#96;in_progress&#96; status",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 256,
                  "content": "- **Status badge**: Shows \"Running\" or \"Queued\" badge with spinner when evaluation is not done (shown even before any provider results arrive)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 257,
                  "content": "- **Tabs**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 258,
                  "content": "  - **Leaderboard**: Only visible when status is &#96;done&#96; - comparative table and charts",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 259,
                  "content": "  - **Outputs**: Two-panel layout similar to STT - provider list on left, details on right"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 260,
                  "content": "  - **About**: Metric descriptions",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 261,
                  "content": "- **Outputs tab layout** (two-panel, similar to TestRunnerDialog):",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 262,
                  "content": "  - **Left panel** (w-64): Provider list with status icons based on &#96;success&#96; field:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 263,
                  "content": "    - Yellow pulsing dot when &#96;success === null&#96; (in progress)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 264,
                  "content": "    - Green checkmark when &#96;success === true&#96; (completed successfully)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 265,
                  "content": "    - Red X when &#96;success === false&#96; (failed)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 266,
                  "content": "  - **Right panel**: Selected provider's overall metrics + results table with audio playback"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 267,
                  "content": "  - First provider is selected by default"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 268,
                  "content": "  - Clicking a provider shows its details on the right"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 269,
                  "content": "- **Provider error messages** (red ❌ with message): Only displayed when evaluation status is &#96;done&#96;, not during &#96;in_progress&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 270,
                  "content": "- **Metrics**: LLM Judge (Pass/Fail), TTFB, Processing Time",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 271,
                  "content": "- **Intermediate results structure**: &#96;results&#96; array contains &#96;id&#96;, &#96;text&#96;, &#96;audio_path&#96;; &#96;llm_judge_score&#96; and &#96;llm_judge_reasoning&#96; are only present when complete",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 291,
                  "content": "  - **Characteristics**: Detailed personality description (age, background, speaking style, temperament)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 292,
                  "content": "  - **Gender**: Male or Female (affects voice synthesis)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 293,
                  "content": "  - **Language**: English, Hindi, or Kannada"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 294,
                  "content": "  - **Interruption Sensitivity**: None, Low, Medium, or High (simulates real users interrupting agents mid-sentence)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 295,
                  "content": "    - Low: 25% probability of interruption",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 316,
                  "content": "**What you can do:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 317,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 318,
                  "content": "- **Define evaluation criteria** for simulations"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 319,
                  "content": "- **Configure pass/fail thresholds**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 320,
                  "content": "- **Set up custom metrics**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 354,
                  "content": "  - Simulation results appear incrementally as each simulation completes",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 355,
                  "content": "  - Overall metrics only shown after run completes (status === \"done\")",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 356,
                  "content": "  - Individual simulation rows can have &#96;evaluation_results: null&#96; while still processing"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 357,
                  "content": "  - **Row spinner states**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 358,
                  "content": "    - **Play button only**: Row has &#96;evaluation_results&#96; (metrics complete)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 359,
                  "content": "    - **Spinner around play button (yellow)**: Row has transcript but no &#96;evaluation_results&#96; (processing)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 360,
                  "content": "    - **Spinner only (gray)**: Row has no transcript and no &#96;evaluation_results&#96; (waiting)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 361,
                  "content": "    - **First column structure**: Uses &#96;relative&#96; container with spinner positioned &#96;absolute inset-0&#96;, play button centered with &#96;relative z-10&#96;. Spinner wraps around the play button visually.",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 362,
                  "content": "    - **Metric column spinners**: Each metric cell shows &#96;w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0&#96; spinner when &#96;evaluation_results&#96; is null; yellow when processing, gray when waiting"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 363,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 364,
                  "content": "- **Overall Metrics** (only shown when status is \"done\", aggregated across all simulations):",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 373,
                  "content": "  - Persona + Scenario combination",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 374,
                  "content": "  - Individual metric scores (Pass/Fail with tooltips showing reasoning)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 375,
                  "content": "  - Metric columns derived from &#96;runData.metrics&#96; keys, or from &#96;simulation_results[].evaluation_results&#96; when metrics is null"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 376,
                  "content": "  - Latency metrics (stt/ttft, llm/ttft, etc.) are excluded from the table (shown in latency tab instead)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 377,
                  "content": "  - &#96;stt_llm_judge_score&#96; displayed as percentage, other metrics as Pass/Fail"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 378,
                  "content": "  - View transcript button (only shown for rows with transcript history; available even while evaluation is pending)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 379,
                  "content": "  - Audio playback (for voice simulations)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 380,
                  "content": "  - **Processing state**: Rows with &#96;evaluation_results: null&#96; show spinners in metric cells (yellow if has transcript/processing, gray if waiting) and a spinner beside the play button"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 381,
                  "content": "  - **Row sorting** (for intermediate results): Rows are sorted by processing state priority:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 382,
                  "content": "    1. Completed rows (have transcript and evaluation_results) - at the top"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 383,
                  "content": "    2. Processing rows (have transcript but no evaluation_results - yellow spinner) - middle"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 384,
                  "content": "    3. Waiting rows (no transcript - gray spinner) - at the bottom",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 385,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 388,
                  "content": "  - **Live updates with freeze-on-complete**: Dialog stays in sync with polling while simulation is in progress, then freezes:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 389,
                  "content": "    - Stores &#96;selectedSimulationKey&#96; using &#96;simulation_name&#96; (unique identifier)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 390,
                  "content": "    - Uses &#96;frozenSimulationRef&#96; to store a stable copy once simulation has &#96;evaluation_results&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 391,
                  "content": "    - &#96;useMemo&#96; logic: if frozen and complete → use frozen data; if just completed → freeze it; if in progress → use live data",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 392,
                  "content": "    - Prevents audio reload when polling updates other rows while viewing a completed simulation",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 394,
                  "content": "  - **Auto-scroll**: Transcript container scrolls to bottom only when new messages are added (tracks &#96;prevTranscriptLengthRef&#96; and only scrolls if &#96;currentLength &gt; previous&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 395,
                  "content": "  - **Empty state**: Shows \"No transcript available yet\" when transcript is empty or undefined",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 396,
                  "content": "  - **Processing indicator**: Shows a yellow spinner at the bottom of transcript while metrics are being fetched (when &#96;evaluation_results&#96; is null but transcript has content)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 397,
                  "content": "  - **Graceful null handling**: All transcript accesses use optional chaining (&#96;transcript?.length ?? 0&#96;, &#96;transcript ?? []&#96;) since transcript can be undefined during intermediate results",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 398,
                  "content": "  - **Stable audio keys**: All audio elements use &#96;key={audioUrl}&#96; to prevent React from remounting them during polling re-renders (avoids audio restart/reload)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 405,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 406,
                  "content": "- **Latency Metrics** (for voice simulations, in Performance/Latency tabs):",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 407,
                  "content": "  - STT latency (TTFB, processing time)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 408,
                  "content": "  - LLM latency",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 409,
                  "content": "  - TTS latency"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 410,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 411,
                  "content": "---",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 418,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 419,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 420,
                  "content": "User Speech → [STT] → Text → [LLM] → Response Text → [TTS] → Agent Speech"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 421,
                  "content": "                              ↓",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 422,
                  "content": "                        [Tool Calls]",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 427,
                  "content": "Pense allows testing and benchmarking each component:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 428,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 429,
                  "content": "- **STT (Speech-to-Text)**: Converts user's voice to text"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 430,
                  "content": "- **LLM (Large Language Model)**: Generates intelligent responses"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 431,
                  "content": "- **TTS (Text-to-Speech)**: Converts agent's response to voice"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 432,
                  "content": "- **Tools**: External functions the LLM can call",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 433,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 443,
                  "content": "This enables:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 444,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 445,
                  "content": "- Testing edge cases (angry customers, language barriers)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 446,
                  "content": "- Regression testing after changes",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 447,
                  "content": "- Scale testing (run hundreds of simulations)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 448,
                  "content": "- Objective evaluation with consistent criteria"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 449,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 450,
                  "content": "---",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
