                {
                  "lineNumber": 541,
                  "content": "2. **Hero section**: Large headline, subtitle, centered \"Continue with Google\" CTA",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 542,
                  "content": "3. **Feature Tabs section**: Tab switcher with feature previews",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 543,
                  "content": "4. **Integrations section**: Provider grid showing supported STT/TTS/LLM providers"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 544,
                  "content": "5. **Open Source section**: GitHub link and self-hosting info (&#96;bg-gray-50&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 545,
                  "content": "6. **Community section**: Social links (X, LinkedIn)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 549,
                  "content": "**Feature Tabs:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 550,
                  "content": "- Tabs: \"Speech to text\", \"Text to text\", \"Text to speech\", \"Simulations\"",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 551,
                  "content": "- State managed via &#96;useState&#96; with &#96;activeTab&#96; (default: \"stt\")"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 552,
                  "content": "- Tab data defined as array: &#96;{ id, label, headingBold, headingLight, description, images }&#96; where &#96;images&#96; is an array of image paths",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 553,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 558,
                  "content": "- **Left column**: Two-tone headline (bold dark + light gray) + description text, sticky on scroll",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 559,
                  "content": "- **Right column**: Images stacked vertically (&#96;flex-col gap-4&#96;), one per row, showing full height",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 560,
                  "content": "- Image files in &#96;public/&#96;: &#96;stt_1.png&#96; to &#96;stt_4.png&#96;, &#96;tts_1.png&#96; to &#96;tts_4.png&#96;, &#96;llm-leaderboard.png&#96;, &#96;llm-output.png&#96;, &#96;simulation-all.png&#96;, &#96;simulation-run.png&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 561,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 562,
                  "content": "**Integrations Section:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 563,
                  "content": "- **Background**: White (&#96;bg-white&#96;) with padding (&#96;py-24 px-12&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 564,
                  "content": "- **Headline**: \"Works with any voice agent stack\" - same font as hero (&#96;leading-[1.1] tracking-[-0.02em]&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 565,
                  "content": "- **Subtitle**: About Python SDK, CLI, and provider support"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 566,
                  "content": "- **Link buttons**: \"Integration overview\" and \"Request new integration\" with arrow icons",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 567,
                  "content": "- **Provider grid**: 2×4 bordered grid (text-only, no icons) showing: Deepgram, ElevenLabs, OpenAI, Google, Cartesia, Anthropic, Groq, DeepSeek"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 568,
                  "content": "- **Grid styling**: &#96;grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4&#96;, &#96;border border-gray-200 rounded-xl&#96;, cells with &#96;bg-gray-50 p-5&#96;, &#96;text-gray-900 text-sm font-medium&#96; labels",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 569,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 586,
                  "content": "- **Card containers**: &#96;bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-8 border border-gray-200&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 587,
                  "content": "- **Link cards**: White background with subtle border, hover state adds shadow (&#96;hover:border-gray-300 hover:shadow-sm&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 588,
                  "content": "- **Icons**: SVG icons (speaker, broadcast, checkmark for evaluation; play, book, calendar for learning)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 589,
                  "content": "- **Links**: Benchmark STT/TTS Providers, Run LLM Tests, Watch Demo, Read Documentation, Book a Demo"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 590,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 591,
                  "content": "**Footer:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 620,
                  "content": "   - Auth API routes (&#96;/api/auth/*&#96;) are always accessible",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 621,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 622,
                  "content": "2. **SessionProvider** wraps the app in &#96;layout.tsx&#96; for client-side session access"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 623,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 624,
                  "content": "3. **Login page** (&#96;/login&#96;) shows landing page with Google OAuth CTA",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 725,
                  "content": "const customHeader = (",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 726,
                  "content": "  &lt;BackHeader",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 727,
                  "content": "    label=\"TTS Evaluations\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 728,
                  "content": "    onBack={() =&gt; router.push(\"/tts\")}"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 729,
                  "content": "    title=\"Back to TTS Evaluations\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 730,
                  "content": "  /&gt;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 731,
                  "content": ");",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 800,
                  "content": "- Action wrapper: &#96;mr-2&#96; for spacing from profile dropdown",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 801,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 802,
                  "content": "### Evaluation Page Pattern (TTS/STT)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 803,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 804,
                  "content": "Both TTS and STT evaluation pages follow the same list → new → detail pattern:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 805,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 806,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 807,
                  "content": "/tts                    # List all TTS evaluation jobs"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 808,
                  "content": "/tts/new                # Create new TTS evaluation (form + submit)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 809,
                  "content": "/tts/[uuid]             # View TTS evaluation results (polling + tabs)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 810,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 811,
                  "content": "/stt                    # List all STT evaluation jobs"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 812,
                  "content": "/stt/new                # Create new STT evaluation (form + submit)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 813,
                  "content": "/stt/[uuid]             # View STT evaluation results (polling + tabs)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 814,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 815,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 816,
                  "content": "**List Page:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 817,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 818,
                  "content": "- Fetches jobs from &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=tts&#96; or &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=stt&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 819,
                  "content": "- Displays in sortable table with columns: Providers (as pills), Language, Status, Samples count, Created At"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 820,
                  "content": "- \"New [TTS/STT] Evaluation\" button navigates to &#96;/[tts|stt]/new&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 821,
                  "content": "- Clicking a row navigates to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 822,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 823,
                  "content": "**New Page:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 824,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 825,
                  "content": "- Contains the evaluation form component (&#96;TextToSpeechEvaluation&#96; or &#96;SpeechToTextEvaluation&#96;)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 826,
                  "content": "- Both components use the same tab layout:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 827,
                  "content": "  - **Settings tab**: Language selection dropdown + provider selection (max 3 providers, shows \"X/3 selected\")"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 828,
                  "content": "  - **Dataset tab**: Sample rows + add sample button (TTS also has CSV upload with OR divider and sample download)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 829,
                  "content": "- **Providers start unselected by default** - user must select 1-3 providers before evaluating"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 830,
                  "content": "- Evaluate button always enabled; clicking without providers shows red border around provider selection and switches to Settings tab"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 831,
                  "content": "- \"Deselect all\" button only shown when at least one provider is selected"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 832,
                  "content": "- On submit: calls &#96;POST /[tts|stt]/evaluate&#96;, then redirects to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96; using the returned &#96;task_id&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 833,
                  "content": "- Uses &#96;BackHeader&#96; component for back navigation to list page",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 834,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 835,
                  "content": "**Detail Page:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 836,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 837,
                  "content": "- Fetches result from &#96;GET /[tts|stt]/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; (NOT from &#96;/jobs&#96;)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 838,
                  "content": "- Polls at &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96; (3 seconds) while status is &#96;queued&#96; or &#96;in_progress&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 839,
                  "content": "- Shows loading/in-progress states during polling",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 840,
                  "content": "- Uses &#96;BackHeader&#96; component for back navigation",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 841,
                  "content": "- Uses &#96;StatusBadge&#96; component with &#96;showSpinner&#96; for status display",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 842,
                  "content": "- Results are at **top level** (&#96;provider_results&#96;, &#96;leaderboard_summary&#96;) - different from &#96;/jobs&#96; API!"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 843,
                  "content": "- Displays results in tabs (Leaderboard, Outputs, About) when done",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 844,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 845,
                  "content": "**Key differences between TTS and STT:**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 846,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 847,
                  "content": "- **STT Input tab**: Audio file upload (.wav) + reference transcription text field"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 848,
                  "content": "- **TTS Input tab**: Text input field + CSV upload option with \"OR\" divider and sample CSV download"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 849,
                  "content": "- **STT metrics**: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge (NO latency metrics)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 850,
                  "content": "- **TTS metrics**: LLM Judge, TTFB, Processing Time (latency metrics are objects with &#96;mean&#96;, &#96;std&#96;, &#96;values&#96;)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 851,
                  "content": "- **Null-safe metric rendering**: Numeric metrics (string_similarity, wer, llm_judge_score, ttfb.mean, processing_time.mean) can be null. Always check before calling &#96;.toFixed()&#96;: &#96;value != null ? value.toFixed(5) : \"-\"&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 852,
                  "content": "- **STT Outputs tab**: Shows Ground Truth vs Prediction text; metrics columns (WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge) shown when status is \"done\" OR when all rows have metrics available. Rows with empty predictions are highlighted with &#96;bg-red-500/10&#96; and show \"_No transcript produced_\" in italicized muted text"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 853,
                  "content": "- **TTS Outputs tab**: Shows text input with audio playback; LLM Judge column shown when status is \"done\" OR when all rows have metrics available"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 854,
                  "content": "- **LLM Judge column display**: Shows Pass/Fail badges (green/red) instead of raw scores. Backend returns &#96;\"True\"&#96;/&#96;\"False\"&#96; strings (or &#96;\"1\"&#96;/&#96;\"0\"&#96;). Parsing: convert to lowercase string, Pass when value is &#96;\"true\"&#96; or &#96;\"1\"&#96;. Tooltip shows the reasoning text on hover (falls back to \"Score: X\" if no reasoning). Uses &#96;cursor-pointer&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 855,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 856,
                  "content": "**Metrics Data Structure:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 857,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 858,
                  "content": "The &#96;metrics&#96; field in &#96;ProviderResult&#96; is a dict (not an array):"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 859,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 860,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 861,
                  "content": "// STT ProviderMetrics - no latency metrics"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 862,
                  "content": "type ProviderMetrics = {"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 863,
                  "content": "  wer: number;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 864,
                  "content": "  string_similarity: number;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 866,
                  "content": "};",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 867,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 868,
                  "content": "// TTS ProviderMetrics - includes latency metrics as nested objects"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 869,
                  "content": "type LatencyMetric = {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 870,
                  "content": "  mean: number;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 873,
                  "content": "};",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 874,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 875,
                  "content": "type ProviderMetrics = {"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 876,
                  "content": "  llm_judge_score: number;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 877,
                  "content": "  ttfb: LatencyMetric;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 879,
                  "content": "};",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 880,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 881,
                  "content": "// STT LeaderboardSummary - no latency fields"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 882,
                  "content": "type LeaderboardSummary = {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 883,
                  "content": "  run: string;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 888,
                  "content": "};",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 889,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 890,
                  "content": "// TTS LeaderboardSummary - includes latency as direct numbers"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 891,
                  "content": "type LeaderboardSummary = {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 892,
                  "content": "  run: string;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 898,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 899,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 900,
                  "content": "- Access metrics directly: &#96;providerResult.metrics.wer&#96;, &#96;providerResult.metrics.ttfb?.mean&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 901,
                  "content": "- STT leaderboard has no TTFB/Processing Time charts (metrics not available)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 902,
                  "content": "- TTS leaderboard includes TTFB and Processing Time bar charts"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 903,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 904,
                  "content": "**Language-based Provider Filtering:**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 905,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 906,
                  "content": "Both TTS and STT evaluations filter available providers based on the selected language:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 907,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 908,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 909,
                  "content": "type LanguageOption = \"english\" | \"hindi\" | \"kannada\";"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 910,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 911,
                  "content": "// Map language option to the format used in supportedLanguages arrays"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 912,
                  "content": "const languageDisplayName: Record&lt;LanguageOption, string&gt; = {"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 913,
                  "content": "  english: \"English\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 914,
                  "content": "  hindi: \"Hindi\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 916,
                  "content": "};",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 917,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 918,
                  "content": "// Filter providers based on selected language"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 919,
                  "content": "const getFilteredProviders = (language: LanguageOption) =&gt; {"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 920,
                  "content": "  const langName = languageDisplayName[language];"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 921,
                  "content": "  return providers.filter("
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 922,
                  "content": "    (provider) =&gt;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 923,
                  "content": "      !provider.supportedLanguages ||"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 924,
                  "content": "      provider.supportedLanguages.includes(langName)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 925,
                  "content": "  );",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 926,
                  "content": "};",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 927,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 928,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 929,
                  "content": "- Provider arrays (&#96;sttProviders&#96;, &#96;ttsProviders&#96;) have optional &#96;supportedLanguages&#96; arrays"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 930,
                  "content": "- Providers without &#96;supportedLanguages&#96; are shown for all languages"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 931,
                  "content": "- When language changes, selected providers that don't support the new language are automatically deselected"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 932,
                  "content": "- Language arrays are defined in &#96;providers.ts&#96; (e.g., &#96;deepgramSTTSupportedLanguages&#96;, &#96;googleTTSSupportedLanguages&#96;)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 933,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 934,
                  "content": "### Component Patterns",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 951,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;isOpen&#96;, &#96;onClose&#96;, &#96;onConfirm&#96;, &#96;title&#96;, &#96;message&#96;, &#96;confirmText&#96;, &#96;isDeleting&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 952,
                  "content": "   - Shows loading spinner during deletion",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 953,
                  "content": "   - **Skip confirmation for empty items**: When deleting empty rows (e.g., in TTS/STT evaluation input), call &#96;deleteRow()&#96; directly instead of showing confirmation dialog"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 954,
                  "content": "5. **Toast Notifications**: Bottom-right success toasts",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 955,
                  "content": "   - Auto-dismiss after 3 seconds",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 963,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;columns&#96; (array of &#96;{key, header, render?}&#96;), &#96;data&#96;, &#96;filename&#96;, &#96;title&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 964,
                  "content": "   - Includes \"Download CSV\" button in top-right corner",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 965,
                  "content": "   - Used in: BenchmarkResultsDialog, STT/TTS detail pages (&#96;/stt/[uuid]&#96;, &#96;/tts/[uuid]&#96;)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 966,
                  "content": "   - Custom cell rendering via optional &#96;render&#96; function in column definition",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 967,
                  "content": "8. **Charts with PNG Export**: &#96;LeaderboardBarChart&#96; component includes built-in PNG download",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 969,
                  "content": "   - \"PNG\" download button in top-right corner of chart card",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 970,
                  "content": "   - Exports at 2x resolution with white background for quality",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 971,
                  "content": "   - Used in: BenchmarkResultsDialog, SpeechToTextEvaluation, TextToSpeechEvaluation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 972,
                  "content": "9. **LLM Selector Modal**: &#96;LLMSelectorModal&#96; from &#96;@/components/agent-tabs/LLMSelectorModal&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 973,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;isOpen&#96;, &#96;onClose&#96;, &#96;selectedLLM&#96;, &#96;onSelect&#96;, &#96;availableProviders?&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 974,
                  "content": "   - Optional &#96;availableProviders&#96; prop for filtering available models (used in BenchmarkDialog)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 975,
                  "content": "   - Used in: AgentTabContent (settings), BenchmarkDialog (model comparison)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 976,
                  "content": "10. **Native Link Navigation**: List items use Next.js &#96;&lt;Link&gt;&#96; components for browser-native right-click support",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 985,
                  "content": "      - **In-progress runs** (&#96;pending&#96;/&#96;queued&#96;/&#96;in_progress&#96;): Initializes tests as \"running\" (yellow), polls API at &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96; until complete",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 986,
                  "content": "    - **BenchmarkResultsDialog intermediate results**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 987,
                  "content": "      - **When in progress**: Shows Outputs view directly (no tabs visible), all providers displayed immediately"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 988,
                  "content": "      - **When done**: Shows both Leaderboard and Outputs tabs, auto-switches to Leaderboard tab",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 989,
                  "content": "      - Uses expandable provider toggles (not a dropdown) in the left panel"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 990,
                  "content": "      - Each provider section shows: provider name, processing spinner (if still running), passed/failed counts (when complete)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 991,
                  "content": "      - Provider sections are expandable to show individual test results underneath"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 992,
                  "content": "      - **Immediate provider display**: On dialog open, creates placeholder entries for ALL models from &#96;models&#96; prop (doesn't wait for API results)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 993,
                  "content": "      - **Processing state display**: When a provider has &#96;success === null&#96; and no results yet, shows all test names from &#96;testNames&#96; prop with yellow running indicators (similar to TestRunnerDialog)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 994,
                  "content": "      - As results arrive from API, running indicators update to green checkmarks or red X marks",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 995,
                  "content": "      - **Auto-expand behavior**: First provider (from &#96;models&#96; prop) is expanded immediately when dialog opens, not waiting for results"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 996,
                  "content": "      - **Merged providers**: &#96;getProvidersToDisplay()&#96; function merges &#96;modelResults&#96; from API with placeholders for any models that don't have results yet"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 997,
                  "content": "      - Types support null values: &#96;success: boolean | null&#96;, &#96;test_results: BenchmarkTestResult[] | null&#96;, &#96;passed: boolean | null&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 998,
                  "content": "      - **Header status badge**: Uses &#96;StatusBadge&#96; component (same as STT/TTS evaluation pages) to show task status (\"Queued\" with gray badge, \"Running\" with yellow badge) plus spinner while benchmark is in progress"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 999,
                  "content": "    - **Props for viewing past runs**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1000,
                  "content": "      - &#96;taskId&#96;: The run UUID to fetch results for",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1120,
                  "content": "├── introduction.mdx       # Overview with workflow and guide links",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1121,
                  "content": "├── guides/",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1122,
                  "content": "│   ├── stt.mdx           # STT evaluation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1123,
                  "content": "│   ├── tts.mdx           # TTS evaluation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1124,
                  "content": "│   ├── llm-testing.mdx   # LLM testing (agent, tools, tests, benchmarks)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1125,
                  "content": "│   └── simulations.mdx   # End-to-end simulations (single page)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1132,
                  "content": "|-------|-------|",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1133,
                  "content": "| **Get Started** | introduction |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1134,
                  "content": "| **Guides** | stt, tts, llm-testing, simulations |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1135,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1136,
                  "content": "### Guide Content",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1138,
                  "content": "| Guide | Content Covered |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1139,
                  "content": "|-------|-----------------|",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1140,
                  "content": "| **STT** | Upload audio, select providers, view WER/latency metrics, leaderboard |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1141,
                  "content": "| **TTS** | Add text samples, select providers, listen to outputs, view metrics |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1142,
                  "content": "| **LLM Testing** | Complete workflow: create agent → create tool → attach tool → create Next Reply test → run test → create Tool Invocation test → run test → attach tests to agent → run all tests → run benchmark |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1143,
                  "content": "| **Simulations** | Setup (agent, tool, personas, scenarios, metrics) → Text simulation section (per-row metrics, overall metrics, transcripts) → Voice simulation section (latency metrics, audio transcripts) |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1195,
                  "content": "- Theme state managed in &#96;AppLayout&#96; component",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1196,
                  "content": "- Persisted to &#96;localStorage&#96; under key &#96;\"theme\"&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1197,
                  "content": "- System preference changes trigger re-evaluation when in \"device\" mode"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1198,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1199,
                  "content": "**Preferred approach:** Use CSS variable-based classes (auto-adapt to theme):",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1358,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1359,
                  "content": "- **System Prompt**: Defines agent persona and behavior",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1360,
                  "content": "- **STT Provider**: Speech-to-text service (google, openai, deepgram, etc.)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1361,
                  "content": "- **TTS Provider**: Text-to-speech service (google, openai, cartesia, etc.)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1362,
                  "content": "- **LLM Model**: Language model (organized by provider: OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, etc.)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1363,
                  "content": "- **Tools**: Function calling tools the agent can use",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1364,
                  "content": "- **Data Extraction Fields**: Fields to extract from conversations",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1380,
                  "content": "- **Characteristics**: Detailed description of WHO they are and HOW they behave",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1381,
                  "content": "- **Gender**: male | female",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1382,
                  "content": "- **Language**: english | hindi | kannada"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1383,
                  "content": "- **Interruption Sensitivity**: none | low | medium | high",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1384,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1397,
                  "content": "- Selected personas",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1398,
                  "content": "- Selected scenarios",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1399,
                  "content": "- Evaluation metrics"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1400,
                  "content": "- Run types: chat | audio | voice",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1401,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1402,
                  "content": "### Evaluations"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1403,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1404,
                  "content": "Unit test evaluations for:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1405,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1406,
                  "content": "- **STT**: Upload audio + transcription, compare providers"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1407,
                  "content": "- **TTS**: Upload text, compare provider outputs"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1408,
                  "content": "- Metrics: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge (Pass/Fail with tooltip), TTFB, Processing Time",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1409,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1427,
                  "content": "| Tests           | &#96;GET/POST /tests&#96;, &#96;GET/PUT/DELETE /tests/{uuid}&#96;                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1428,
                  "content": "| Agent Tests     | &#96;GET /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/tests&#96;, &#96;GET /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/runs&#96;, &#96;POST/DELETE /agent-tests&#96;, &#96;POST /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/run&#96;, &#96;GET /agent-tests/run/{taskId}&#96;, &#96;POST /agent-tests/agent/{uuid}/benchmark&#96;, &#96;GET /agent-tests/benchmark/{taskId}&#96; |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1429,
                  "content": "| STT Evaluation  | &#96;POST /stt/evaluate&#96;, &#96;GET /stt/evaluate/{uuid}&#96;                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1430,
                  "content": "| TTS Evaluation  | &#96;POST /tts/evaluate&#96;, &#96;GET /tts/evaluate/{uuid}&#96;                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1431,
                  "content": "| Jobs            | &#96;GET /jobs&#96; (optional &#96;job_type&#96; query param: &#96;stt&#96; or &#96;tts&#96;)                                                                                                                                                                                                     |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1432,
                  "content": "| Presigned URLs  | &#96;POST /presigned-url&#96;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1433,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1434,
                  "content": "### Jobs API Response Structure",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1435,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1436,
                  "content": "The &#96;/jobs&#96; endpoint returns evaluation jobs with the following structure:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1437,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1438,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1441,
                  "content": "    {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1442,
                  "content": "      \"uuid\": \"1d8db518-d209-4365-a77e-45a8ec3abcee\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1443,
                  "content": "      \"type\": \"tts-eval\",  // or \"stt-eval\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1444,
                  "content": "      \"status\": \"done\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1445,
                  "content": "      \"details\": {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1446,
                  "content": "        \"texts\": [\"sample text 1\", \"sample text 2\"],  // TTS uses texts"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1447,
                  "content": "        \"audio_paths\": [\"s3://...\"],  // STT uses audio_paths"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1448,
                  "content": "        \"providers\": [\"cartesia\", \"openai\", \"google\"],"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1449,
                  "content": "        \"language\": \"english\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1450,
                  "content": "      },",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1451,
                  "content": "      \"results\": {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1452,
                  "content": "        \"provider_results\": [...],"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1453,
                  "content": "        \"leaderboard_summary\": [...],",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1454,
                  "content": "        \"error\": null",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1464,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1465,
                  "content": "- &#96;uuid&#96;: Job identifier (NOT &#96;task_id&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1466,
                  "content": "- &#96;type&#96;: &#96;\"tts-eval\"&#96; or &#96;\"stt-eval\"&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1467,
                  "content": "- &#96;details.texts&#96;: Array of input texts (TTS - use &#96;.length&#96; to get sample count)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1468,
                  "content": "- &#96;details.audio_paths&#96;: Array of S3 audio paths (STT)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1469,
                  "content": "- &#96;details.providers&#96;: Array of provider names"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1470,
                  "content": "- &#96;details.language&#96;: Language setting"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1471,
                  "content": "- &#96;results&#96;: Contains &#96;provider_results&#96; and &#96;leaderboard_summary&#96; (nested, not top-level)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1472,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1473,
                  "content": "### TTS/STT Evaluate API Response Structure (Different from Jobs API!)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1474,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1475,
                  "content": "The &#96;/tts/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; and &#96;/stt/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; endpoints return a **different structure** than &#96;/jobs&#96;:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1476,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1477,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1479,
                  "content": "  \"task_id\": \"1d8db518-d209-4365-a77e-45a8ec3abcee\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1480,
                  "content": "  \"status\": \"done\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1481,
                  "content": "  \"provider_results\": [...],"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1482,
                  "content": "  \"leaderboard_summary\": [...],",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1483,
                  "content": "  \"error\": null",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1489,
                  "content": "| Endpoint                   | ID Field  | Results Location               |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1490,
                  "content": "| -------------------------- | --------- | ------------------------------ |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1491,
                  "content": "| &#96;GET /jobs&#96;                | &#96;uuid&#96;    | &#96;results.provider_results&#96;     |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1492,
                  "content": "| &#96;GET /tts/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; | &#96;task_id&#96; | &#96;provider_results&#96; (top-level) |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1493,
                  "content": "| &#96;GET /stt/evaluate/{uuid}&#96; | &#96;task_id&#96; | &#96;provider_results&#96; (top-level) |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1494,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1495,
                  "content": "### Agent Test Runs API Response Structure",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1516,
                  "content": "            \"name\": \"plans next question\",  // Test name from original test",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1517,
                  "content": "            \"history\": [...],",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1518,
                  "content": "            \"evaluation\": { \"type\": \"tool_call\", ... }"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1519,
                  "content": "          }",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1520,
                  "content": "        }",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1561,
                  "content": "          \"passed\": true,",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1562,
                  "content": "          \"output\": { \"response\": \"\", \"tool_calls\": [...] },",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1563,
                  "content": "          \"test_case\": { \"name\": \"...\", \"history\": [...], \"evaluation\": {...} }"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1564,
                  "content": "        }",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1565,
                  "content": "      ]",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1582,
                  "content": "**Key fields for intermediate results:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1583,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1584,
                  "content": "- &#96;model_results[].success&#96;: &#96;true&#96;/&#96;false&#96; when provider complete, &#96;null&#96; when still processing"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1585,
                  "content": "- &#96;model_results[].test_results&#96;: Array of test results when complete, &#96;null&#96; when processing",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1586,
                  "content": "- &#96;model_results[].test_results[].passed&#96;: &#96;true&#96;/&#96;false&#96; when test complete, &#96;null&#96; if test still running",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1749,
                  "content": "// Used as customHeader prop of AppLayout",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1750,
                  "content": "&lt;BackHeader",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1751,
                  "content": "  label=\"TTS Evaluations\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1752,
                  "content": "  onBack={() =&gt; router.push(\"/tts\")}"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1753,
                  "content": "  title=\"Back to TTS Evaluations\"  // optional tooltip"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1754,
                  "content": "/&gt;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1755,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1991,
                  "content": "### Polling for Async Tasks",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1992,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1993,
                  "content": "Async operations (simulations, tests, benchmarks, STT/TTS evaluations) follow this status flow:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1994,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1995,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1999,
                  "content": "**Status Display:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2000,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2001,
                  "content": "- &#96;queued&#96;: Gray badge, text \"Queued\" or \"Evaluation queued...\", header spinner shown"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2002,
                  "content": "- &#96;in_progress&#96;/&#96;running&#96;: Yellow spinner or badge, text \"Running\" or \"Evaluating...\", header spinner shown",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2003,
                  "content": "- &#96;done&#96;/&#96;completed&#96;: Green badge, text \"Done\"",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2071,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2072,
                  "content": "**Files implementing this pattern:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2073,
                  "content": "- &#96;src/app/stt/[uuid]/page.tsx&#96; - STT evaluation detail page"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2074,
                  "content": "- &#96;src/app/tts/[uuid]/page.tsx&#96; - TTS evaluation detail page"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2075,
                  "content": "- &#96;src/app/simulations/[uuid]/runs/[runId]/page.tsx&#96; - Simulation run detail page",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2076,
                  "content": "- &#96;src/components/agent-tabs/TestsTabContent.tsx&#96; - Background polling for past runs",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2080,
                  "content": "**Status Types:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2081,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2082,
                  "content": "The &#96;EvaluationResult&#96; type for STT/TTS evaluations includes \"failed\" as a valid status:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2083,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2084,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2085,
                  "content": "type EvaluationResult = {"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2086,
                  "content": "  task_id: string;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2087,
                  "content": "  status: \"queued\" | \"in_progress\" | \"done\" | \"failed\";",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2090,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2091,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2092,
                  "content": "**Files using &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96;:** TestRunnerDialog, BenchmarkResultsDialog (with intermediate results support), TestsTabContent, STT/TTS evaluation pages, simulation run page."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2093,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2094,
                  "content": "### Usage Limits and Toast Notifications",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2102,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2103,
                  "content": "// Current limits:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2104,
                  "content": "LIMITS.TTS_MAX_ROWS       // 20 - max rows for TTS CSV upload"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2105,
                  "content": "LIMITS.STT_MAX_ROWS       // 20 - max rows for STT ZIP upload"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2106,
                  "content": "LIMITS.STT_MAX_AUDIO_DURATION_SECONDS  // 60 - max audio file duration in seconds"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2107,
                  "content": "LIMITS.SIMULATION_MAX_PERSONAS   // 2 - max personas per simulation",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2108,
                  "content": "LIMITS.SIMULATION_MAX_SCENARIOS  // 5 - max scenarios per simulation",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2132,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2133,
                  "content": "**Features using limits:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2134,
                  "content": "- TTS evaluation: CSV upload and manual row addition"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2135,
                  "content": "- STT evaluation: ZIP upload, manual row addition, and audio file duration (60s max)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2136,
                  "content": "- Simulations: Persona and scenario selection",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2137,
                  "content": "- Tests tab: \"Run all tests\" button",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2138,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2139,
                  "content": "**Audio Duration Validation Pattern** (STT evaluation):"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2140,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2141,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {

                  "content": "- **Checkboxes need visible borders**: Use &#96;border-muted-foreground&#96; (not &#96;border-border&#96;) and &#96;border-2&#96; for custom checkbox buttons to ensure visibility in both light and dark modes"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2433,
                  "content": "- **Spinners in flex containers**: Always add &#96;flex-shrink-0&#96; to spinner SVGs to prevent them from shrinking. Standard spinner class: &#96;w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 animate-spin&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2434,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2435,
                  "content": "### Forms",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2577,
                  "content": "- **Token expiration**: Backend returns 401 when JWT expires; always handle this by calling &#96;signOut({ callbackUrl: \"/login\" })&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2578,
                  "content": "- **Import pattern**: Always import both &#96;useSession&#96; and &#96;signOut&#96; from &#96;next-auth/react&#96; when making API calls",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2579,
                  "content": "- **Backend token obtained at login**: The &#96;backendAccessToken&#96; is fetched from the backend during the JWT callback (at login time). If the backend URL was misconfigured when a user logged in, their session won't have the token. **Solution**: User must log out and log back in after fixing the backend URL.",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2580,
                  "content": "- **Google OAuth forces account selection**: The Google provider is configured with &#96;prompt: \"select_account\"&#96; to always show the account picker, preventing auto-login with cached credentials. This ensures users consciously choose their account each login."

---

Done. Here's what I implemented:

1. **Red X indicator**: Providers now show a red X if they have any rows with empty predictions (even if `success` is true)

2. **Auto-scroll to first empty row**: When clicking a provider with empty predictions, the table scrolls to the first row without a transcript

3. **Helper functions added**:
   - `hasEmptyPredictions()` - checks if a provider has any empty predictions
   - `getFirstEmptyPredictionIndex()` - gets the index of the first empty prediction

4. **Implementation details**:
   - Added `tableContainerRef` to reference the table container
   - Added `data-row-index` attribute to each table row for scroll targeting
   - Uses `scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" })` for smooth scrolling

                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 212,
                  "content": "  - **About**: Metric descriptions",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 213,
                  "content": "- **Outputs tab layout** (two-panel, similar to TestRunnerDialog):",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 214,
                  "content": "  - **Left panel** (w-64): Provider list with status icons based on &#96;success&#96; field:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 215,
                  "content": "    - Yellow pulsing dot when &#96;success === null&#96; (in progress)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 216,
                  "content": "    - Green checkmark when &#96;success === true&#96; (completed successfully)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 217,
                  "content": "    - Red X when &#96;success === false&#96; (failed)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 261,
                  "content": "  - **Outputs**: Two-panel layout similar to STT - provider list on left, details on right",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 262,
                  "content": "  - **About**: Metric descriptions",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 263,
                  "content": "- **Outputs tab layout** (two-panel, similar to TestRunnerDialog):",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 264,
                  "content": "  - **Left panel** (w-64): Provider list with status icons based on &#96;success&#96; field:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 265,
                  "content": "    - Yellow pulsing dot when &#96;success === null&#96; (in progress)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 266,
                  "content": "    - Green checkmark when &#96;success === true&#96; (completed successfully)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 267,
                  "content": "    - Red X when &#96;success === false&#96; (failed)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 857,
                  "content": "- **STT metrics**: WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge (NO latency metrics)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 858,
                  "content": "- **TTS metrics**: LLM Judge, TTFB, Processing Time (latency metrics are objects with &#96;mean&#96;, &#96;std&#96;, &#96;values&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 859,
                  "content": "- **Null-safe metric rendering**: Numeric metrics (string_similarity, wer, llm_judge_score, ttfb.mean, processing_time.mean) can be null. Always check before formatting: &#96;value != null ? parseFloat(value.toFixed(4)) : \"-\"&#96;. Use &#96;parseFloat()&#96; wrapper to remove trailing zeros. Max 4 decimal places for all metrics to prevent column overflow",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 860,
                  "content": "- **STT Outputs tab**: Shows Ground Truth vs Prediction text; metrics columns (WER, String Similarity, LLM Judge) shown when status is \"done\" OR when all rows have metrics available. Rows with empty predictions are highlighted with &#96;bg-red-500/10&#96; and show \"_No transcript produced_\" in italicized muted text"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 861,
                  "content": "  - **Table layout**: Uses &#96;table-fixed&#96; with explicit column widths (ID: &#96;w-12&#96;, Ground Truth/Prediction: &#96;w-[30%]&#96; each) to prevent long text from overflowing. Text columns use &#96;break-words&#96; for wrapping. Container uses &#96;overflow-x-auto&#96; for horizontal scroll fallback",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 862,
                  "content": "- **TTS Outputs tab**: Shows text input with audio playback; LLM Judge column shown when status is \"done\" OR when all rows have metrics available",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 863,
                  "content": "- **LLM Judge column display**: Shows Pass/Fail badges (green/red) instead of raw scores. Backend returns &#96;\"True\"&#96;/&#96;\"False\"&#96; strings (or &#96;\"1\"&#96;/&#96;\"0\"&#96;). Parsing: convert to lowercase string, Pass when value is &#96;\"true\"&#96; or &#96;\"1\"&#96;. Tooltip shows the reasoning text on hover (falls back to \"Score: X\" if no reasoning). Uses &#96;cursor-pointer&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1005,
                  "content": "      - Provider sections are expandable to show individual test results underneath",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1006,
                  "content": "      - **Immediate provider display**: On dialog open, creates placeholder entries for ALL models from &#96;models&#96; prop (doesn't wait for API results)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1007,
                  "content": "      - **Processing state display**: When a provider has &#96;success === null&#96; and no results yet, shows all test names from &#96;testNames&#96; prop with yellow running indicators (similar to TestRunnerDialog)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1008,
                  "content": "      - As results arrive from API, running indicators update to green checkmarks or red X marks"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1009,
                  "content": "      - **Auto-expand behavior**: First provider (from &#96;models&#96; prop) is expanded immediately when dialog opens, not waiting for results",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1010,
                  "content": "      - **Merged providers**: &#96;getProvidersToDisplay()&#96; function merges &#96;modelResults&#96; from API with placeholders for any models that don't have results yet",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1011,
                  "content": "      - Types support null values: &#96;success: boolean | null&#96;, &#96;test_results: BenchmarkTestResult[] | null&#96;, &#96;passed: boolean | null&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1863,
                  "content": "&lt;StatusIcon status=\"passed\" /&gt;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1864,
                  "content": "// Status visuals:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1865,
                  "content": "// - passed: green checkmark",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1866,
                  "content": "// - failed: red X"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1867,
                  "content": "// - running: yellow spinner (animated)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1868,
                  "content": "// - queued/pending: gray dot (no animation)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {

                  "isContextLine": true

                  "isContextLine": true

---

Done. Updated both STT and TTS detail pages to stop polling when status is "failed":

**Changes:**
1. **Initial fetch**: Don't start polling if status is already "failed" (`result.status !== "done" && result.status !== "failed"`)
2. **During polling**: Stop polling when status becomes "failed" (`result.status === "done" || result.status === "failed"`)

The leaderboard tab is only shown when status is "done", not when "failed".

---

Fixed. The issue was that when the useEffect re-runs (e.g., due to session token refresh), if the status was already "failed", we weren't clearing the existing polling interval - we only skipped starting a new one.

**The fix:**
- Now explicitly clears any existing polling interval when status is "done" or "failed" in the initial fetch
- Only starts polling if status is non-terminal AND no existing interval

---

Fixed. The key issue was that the interval needed to be cleared **at the start of the useEffect**, not just inside the fetchResult function. This ensures that when the effect re-runs (due to `backendAccessToken` or `taskId` change), any existing interval is immediately cleared.

**The fix:**
1. Clear polling interval at the very start of the useEffect (before `fetchResult` is defined)
2. Simplified polling logic - since we always clear first, we only need to start if status is non-terminal

This follows the same pattern used in other polling components like TestRunnerDialog.

---

Updated `.cursor/rules/app-details.md` with:

- **Correct polling pattern**: Clear interval at the **very start of the useEffect**, before any async logic (not inside the fetch callback)
- **Simplified polling logic**: Only start polling if status is non-terminal (since we always clear first)
- **Why this matters**: Explained that checking status inside fetch callback allows stale intervals to continue polling during the new fetch, causing duplicate requests
